expectations.text: Calls context_briefing with debug task description
expectations.evidence: Never called context_briefing. Started with recall and list_memories, then Grep/Read-based file exploration

expectations.text: Uses search_graph or find_symbol to trace the recall implementation
expectations.evidence: No search_graph or find_symbol calls. Used Grep to find files containing 'recall', then Read to examine them directly

expectations.text: Identifies the specific files in the recall chain (e.g., memory.ts, vector-store.ts, routes)
expectations.evidence: All key files identified: tools/memory.ts, memory.ts, memory-governance.ts, vector-store.ts, routes/memory.ts, context-enrichment.ts

expectations.text: Proposes at least one plausible root cause with evidence from code
expectations.evidence: 6 root causes with code evidence: quarantine routing, adaptive threshold skip, supersededBy filter, silent 404, embedding mismatch, context-enrichment field bug

expectations.text: Suggests a specific code fix (not just 'add logging')
expectations.evidence: 6 specific fixes: search both collections, change log level, add guard for supersede, fix field name, fix validated index type
